About this product

A second fossil dinosaur option that adds range and makes the fossil collection feel more intentional. This polished preview shows how the product page should feel once the final Shopify build is underway: cleaner hierarchy, better spacing, and stronger confidence around size and pickup information.

Why this page feels more premium

Instead of burying the key information, the layout keeps the gallery strong, the buy panel tight, and the support notes close to the main action. That makes the page feel more intentional and easier to shop.
